Femal: A photo of a female pedestrian.
AgeLess16: A photo of a pedestrian who is a child or teenager under 16 years old.
Age17-30: A photo of a young adult pedestrian between the ages of 17 and 30.
Age31-45: A photo of a middle-aged adult pedestrian between the ages of 31 and 45.
Age46-60: A photo of a pedestrian who appears to be between the ages of 46 and 60.
BodyFat: A photo of a pedestrian with a large, heavy, or overweight body build.
BodyNormal: A photo of a pedestrian with a normal or average body build.
BodyThin: A photo of a pedestrian with a thin, slim, or slender body build.
Customer: A photo of a pedestrian acting as a customer or shopper in a commercial area.
Employee: A photo of a pedestrian dressed as an employee, clerk, or staff member.
hs-BaldHead: A photo of a pedestrian with a bald head or no hair.
hs-LongHair: A photo of a pedestrian with long hair.
hs-BlackHair: A photo of a pedestrian with black hair.
hs-Hat: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a hat, cap, or head covering.
hs-Glasses: A photo of a pedestrian wearing glasses or eyewear.
ub-Shirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a collared shirt or button-down top.
ub-Sweater: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a sweater, knitwear, or jumper.
ub-Vest: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a vest or sleeveless upper garment.
ub-TShirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a T-shirt.
ub-Cotton: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a cotton fabric upper garment.
ub-Jacket: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a jacket or coat.
ub-SuitUp: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a formal suit or blazer.
ub-Tight: A photo of a pedestrian wearing tight-fitting upper body clothing.
ub-ShortSleeve: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a short-sleeved top.
lb-LongTrousers: A photo of a pedestrian wearing full-length trousers or pants.
lb-Skirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a skirt.
lb-ShortSkirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a short skirt.
lb-Dress: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a dress.
lb-Jeans: A photo of a pedestrian wearing denim jeans.
lb-TightTrousers: A photo of a pedestrian wearing tight-fitting trousers or leggings.
shoes-Leather: A photo of a pedestrian wearing leather shoes.
shoes-Sports: A photo of a pedestrian wearing athletic sneakers or sports shoes.
shoes-Boots: A photo of a pedestrian wearing boots.
shoes-Cloth: A photo of a pedestrian wearing cloth or canvas shoes.
shoes-Casual: A photo of a pedestrian wearing casual everyday footwear.
attachment-Backpack: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a backpack on their back.
attachment-ShoulderBag: A photo of a pedestrian carrying a bag with a strap over their shoulder.
attachment-HandBag: A photo of a pedestrian carrying a handbag or purse in their hand.
attachment-Box: A photo of a pedestrian carrying a cardboard box or rectangular package.
attachment-PlasticBag: A photo of a pedestrian carrying a plastic shopping bag.
attachment-PaperBag: A photo of a pedestrian carrying a paper shopping bag.
attachment-HandTrunk: A photo of a pedestrian pulling or carrying a suitcase or hand trunk luggage.
attachment-Other: A photo of a pedestrian carrying a miscellaneous or unspecified object.
action-Calling: A photo of a pedestrian making a phone call with a mobile device.
action-Talking: A photo of a pedestrian engaged in a conversation or talking.
action-Gathering: A photo of a pedestrian standing in a group or gathering of people.
action-Holding: A photo of a pedestrian holding an object in their hands.
action-Pushing: A photo of a pedestrian pushing an object like a cart, stroller, or trolley.
action-Pulling: A photo of a pedestrian pulling an object or luggage behind them.
action-CarryingByArm: A photo of a pedestrian carrying an object tucked under or over their arm.
action-CarryingByHand: A photo of a pedestrian carrying an object directly in their hand.
hs-Muffler: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a muffler or scarf around their neck.
hs-Mask: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a face mask.
attachment-WaistBag: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a waist bag or fanny pack around their hip.
